properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 81/14

BARENTS SEA
THE SEISMIC VESSEL PRINCESS CALL SIGN JXBV3  IS CONDUCTINING SEISIMIC SURVEY IN AREAS BOUNDED BY FOLLOWING POSITIONS:

 A  71-04.2N 022-59.9E
 B  71-01.5N 021-59.9E
 C  70-28.1N 018-51.1E
 D  70-50.9N 018-04.9E
 E  71-27,0N 021-39.9E
 F  71-34,0N 021-39.9E
 G  71-52,0N 021-39.9E
 H  71-53.3N 024-54.7E
 I  71-26.1N 024-54.9E
 J  71-13.3N 024-54.7E
 K  71-12.6N 023-46.7E
 L  71-04.4N 023-07.1E


S/V PRINCESS ARE TOWING ONE STREAMER 7000 MTRS LONG AND REQUIRE WIDE BERTH OF 7NM ON THE STERN AND 3 NM FORWARD AND ABEAM.
THE TOWING EQUIPMENT IS EQUIPED WITH TAIL BUOY AND FLASHING LIGHT FITTED ON IT.
